title: styrax officinalis subsp. californicus
intro: Styrax officinalis subsp. californicus, also known as California styrax or California benzoin, is a plant species in the family Styracaceae, characterized by its fragrant resin and unique properties. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of using Styrax officinalis subsp. californicus include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
